use_cases: Creating animated hero section backgrounds for landing pages
Adding dynamic visual atmosphere to page sections
Serving as a decorative background layer for any content container
Building immersive full-page gradient effects with customizable overlays
Providing a centered content wrapper with configurable visual styling
ai_summary: A reusable React component that creates an animated gradient background effect using framer-motion for smooth transitions between configurable gradient presets. Features customizable animation duration, delay, and optional dark overlay. Wraps children in a centered flex container, making it ideal for hero sections, page backgrounds, or creating visual atmosphere in landing pages and marketing sites.
